reason: Most Minecraft enchantments cap at level III. Level V applies only to specific ones like Sharpness/Smite/Efficiency. '5' is wrong for 'most enchantments'.
How many dwarfs in Snow White (7) is universally known children's knowledge — T1, not T4 (3 tier misplacement)

current: Flora red, Fauna green, Merryweather blue
correct: Flora pink, Fauna green, Merryweather blue
reason: Flora's color in Sleeping Beauty is PINK, not red — she famously fights to make Aurora's dress pink throughout the film
Cinderella leaving at midnight is the single most iconic plot point of Cinderella — universally known T1, not T4
Pinocchio's nose growing when he lies is one of the most universally known facts in children's stories — T1, not T4
Cannonbolt is armadillo-like and rolls into a ball — not made of rock. Diamondhead is the crystal/mineral alien matching 'living rock'.
El Capitan is villain of DuckTales pilot 'Treasure of the Golden Suns'. Merlock is villain of the 1990 DuckTales movie, not the TV series.
Gantu is the galactic captain assigned to capture Stitch. Pleakley is an Earth expert/observer, not the pursuing agent.
The happy dwarf's name is literally 'Happy' — T1 knowledge at most, misplaced at T5 (4 tier error)
